title: Custom Item Attributes (CIA)
description: Customize default attributes of any item, with modded attributes & items supported.
body:
![CIABANNER](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1062424444951330846/1199432511953051709/CIABANNER.png)

Change any item's stats, make them unbreakable, and more!

CIA allows you to easily change ANY item's attributes (included modded ones!) with a config.

[**Requires Necronomicon 1.4.1+**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/necronomicon)

## Easy Configurability

Via its config file, under **config/custom_item_attributes.json5**, you can customize individual attributes with an easy config that includes comments to guide you through each entry.

![cia.png](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1062424444951330846/1199429844421849178/cia.png)

**This mod is not associated in any way with the US Central Intelligence Agency, despite its name.**
